content:
Amol Dadarao Rathod
+91-9096293703 — Email — LinkedIn — GitHub
TECHNICAL SKILLS
• Languages: Python, C++, C, JavaScript
• Core Concepts: Data Structures & Algorithms, OOPs, Operating Systems, Workflow Orchestration, Process Au-
tomation
• Domains: Artificial Intelligence (LLMs, RAG), Data Science, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Cloud Computing,
Web Development
• Tools & Databases: Vector Databases, Oracle Autonomous Database, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, VS Code,
Git/GitHub, Vapi, n8n, Oracle Cloud, Docker, REST APIs, Webhooks, JSON
PROJECTS
Vidhoor - Legal AI Copilot — Live Demo Mar 2026 – Present
Tech Stack: Llama 3.1 8B (Cerebras), RAG, Vector DB, Oracle DB
• EngineeredanAI-poweredlegalassistantutilizingRetrieval-AugmentedGeneration(RAG)andVectorDatabases,
delivering real-time insights with ultra-low latency inference speeds of ˜2,350 tokens per second.
• Processed, trained, and indexed 851 pages of comprehensive Indian legal frameworks, including the Indian Constitu-
tion, BNS, BNSS, IPC, IT Law 2000, and Data Privacy Laws.
• Hosted the architecture on Oracle Autonomous Database leveraging Hybrid Search capabilities.
• Implemented strict data security measures, including End-to-End Encryption (E2EE) and Personally Identifiable In-
formation (PII) handling/redaction.
Interview.io - AI Interview Prep Platform — Live Demo Jan 2026 – Present
Tech Stack: Llama 3.1 8B (Cerebras), Python, JavaScript
• Developed a career preparation platform enabling students to practice via AI-driven mock interviews tailored to
specific technical domains like Software Engineering and Data Science.
• Builtanautomatedresumeparserthatprovidesinstant, actionablefeedbackonformattingandkeywordoptimization.
• Integrated a “Codex” module featuring curated Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) questions covering arrays,
trees, and dynamic programming.
• Designed a customized roadmap generation feature that curates tailored study resources and reference links based on
the user’s career goals.
AI Receptionist Jan 2026
Tech Stack: DeepSeek R1, Vapi, n8n, Automation Workflows
• Developedanintelligentvoicereceptionistpoweredbyadvancedreasoningmodels,aprojectthatsuccessfullypropelled
the team to the finals of the OpenAI Academy x Nxt Wave Buildathon.
• Enabled the seamless handling of real-time appointment booking, searching, and rescheduling for users.
• Orchestrated automated workflows using REST APIs and Webhooks to extract user data, sync appointments to
Google Calendar, log interactions in Google Sheets, and trigger personalized confirmations via Gmail API and
WhatsApp.
CERTIFICATIONS & ACHIEVEMENTS
• Certifications: Career Essentials in Generative AI (Microsoft), GitHub Foundations Part 1 & Part 2, Supervised &
Unsupervised Machine Learning.
• Active competitive programmer with 80+ problems solved on LeetCode focusing on Data Structures and Algorithms.
• Participant, TENET Hack 25 & Innerve X (Army Institute of Technology).
EDUCATION
P.E.S. Modern College of Engineering Pune, MH
B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science July 2024 – Expected July 2028
Current Year: Third Year (T.Y B.Tech) CGPA: 9.03
Key Coursework: Data Structures (DSA), Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Operating System (OS).
